name: Corroded Coffin {GROUP} || Stranger Things
description:
Hey! HOLY SHIT THIS HAS SO MANY TOKENS AND TOOK SO FUCKING LONG!

So, the Stranger Things wiki has a character (plays electric bass guitar in the band) labeled as “Freak 1”. He was the only unnamed character in season four in a major group of the show. I felt like it was harsh and a bit confusing to leave it like that, so I gave him the name Nathan.

This is him:

And I’ve also added the Hanky Code, but it’s really basic. I’ll update it soon so it will include the extended list.

Here’s a chart of the extended list:
